---
title: "People"
description: "Important people, relationships, and agent handles"
---

# Key People

- Fernando Arriaga: Co-Founder and CEO — GitHub: `fernandoarriagau` | Telegram: `@farriaga`
- Williams Verde: Co-Founder and CTO — GitHub: `sparkiq-git`
- Diego Olalde: Co-Founder and Engineering Manager — GitHub: `dolalde-sparkiq` | Telegram: `@diego1494o`

# Agent Handles

- Dev agent GitHub handle (your own — Jeff): `dolalde-sparkiq`
- PM agent GitHub handle (Sparky): `sparkIQ-scrum`
- Code review agent GitHub handle (Merlin): `dolalde-sparkiq`
- Telegram group chat ID: `-5105303344`
